generated_oml:
instance VehicleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on the Physical Twin collect data over time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSensorDataStream
]

instance VehicleSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSensor
]

instance VehicleSensorTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series observations harvested continuously from the Physical Twin via onboard sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler, SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSensorDataStream
]

instance VehicleGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of a vehicle describing wheel sizes, chassis shape, and styling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance VehicleBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model constructed from differential equations to capture system dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm continually refines model parameters based on time‑series sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that updates model parameters based on real‑time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight
]

    base:desc "Indicates updated model parameters reflecting the latest physical reality."
]

]

]

    base:desc "Insight that verifies safety and operational optimality based on model outputs and sensor data."
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HumanDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human‑initiated decision to address identified issues."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides FutureBehaviorInsight
]

instance FutureBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, ComponentFailurePredictionInsight
]

]

instance ComponentFailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of component failures based on anomaly detection."
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Development: models (e.g., CAD for static geometry and dynamic differential‑equation models) are built to understand specific aspects of the system. Deployment: these models are retained and integrated into a Digital Twin framework. Representation: static CAD structures, dynamic simulation models, and parameterised models are utilised. Transition: calibration algorithms adjust model parameters based on sensor data collected from the Physical Twin, aligning the digital representation with reality. Lifecycle governance: safety monitors evaluate model outputs against operational thresholds; violations trigger human or algorithmic intervention, forming an implicit governance loop."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs calibration algorithms to adjust model parameters based on collected data, suggesting a continuous model‑validation loop. However, explicit fidelity requirements, validation and verification procedures, uncertainty sources, error detection and correction mechanisms, or quality assurance processes for models and data are not detailed in the document."
]
